description_long: This bungalow features a prominent dark gable roof with a steep pitch, extending over a covered front porch supported by columns. The facade combines dark and light materials, with wood paneling and painted surfaces, and is accented by flower boxes beneath the windows. The front entrance is accessed by a short staircase, and the side of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating and a fire pit, surrounded by a privacy fence and lush landscaping. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the sides, providing ample natural light. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with a few windows and a continuation of the dark roofline. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, making it suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern bungalow with a steep dark gable roof, covered front porch, and a large wooden deck with outdoor amenities. The exterior features a mix of wood and painted surfaces, with symmetrical windows and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep gable roof, covered porch, flower boxes, and main entrance with stairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, multiple windows, and the spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating and fire pit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuation of the gable roof, a few windows, and the fenced garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a row of windows and a glimpse of the porch and deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
